sacco.gui

Class SButton

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.gui.SButton
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.awt.event.ActionListener, java.util.EventListener, SComponent

    public class SButton
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.awt.event.ActionListener, SComponent

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SButton()
      Constructs a blank SButton with no text
      SButton(java.lang.String text)
      Constructs a new SButton with the given text

      • getSwing

        public javax.swing.JButton getSwing()
        Not designed for normal student use. It returns the wrapped JButton object.

      • setFont

        public void setFont(Font font)
        Sets the font of the butotn according to the FOnt object passed as the parameter
        Parameters:
        font - a Font object representing the desired Font

      • getText

        public java.lang.String getText()
        returns the current text of the SButton
        Returns:

      • addButtonListener

        public void addButtonListener(ButtonListener b)
        Registers the given ButtonListener object with this SButton
        Parameters:
        b - the ButtonListener that the button will respond to when pressed
